Initial commit - Sistema de Gestión Wings

Aplicación Laravel para gestión de alumnos, clases, pagos, liquidaciones y caja operativa.

EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/xampp/htdocs/Gestion_Wings" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add database dump, docs, and DB sync rules for Claude

- Export full database dump to database/dump.sql \(portable across machines\)
- Update CLAUDE.md with mandatory DB sync rule: always export dump before commits
- Add Contratos/Menu Wings.md documentation
- Remove duplicate gestion_wings.sql \(unified as dump.sql\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
